14.3: Bethany khopui-a chi kaomtak ri kaphar aleikoron Simon inna Jesu kha bu abak a alei omlai, numeisa inkhat lungwar ning anbol akok kisip akintheng nard kung ria ansom amankatam sarek anchoi a anheiwa. Khawanu ning sarek kok kha amalong a sarek rim kahoi kha jesu luchunga aleibun.
14.4: Khawa mun na mi alekchu anmulung aleithei a inkhat le inkhat anlei kinbek a anleiril, <<Sarek rim kahoi aminmang hi anemna angmi?
14.5: Hiwa Sarek hi sumsan reijathum kikhella nijor thei e khan sumsan kha sara khodeng kathei ngai pethei e!>> khana numeinu kha anlei rilset je.
14.6: Tak Jesu ning aleiti, <<Khawanu kha abinga daru! Angsik mo ninkachok e? Numeinu hi ning akathatak kei sik a sin atho e.
14.7: Sara ngai chu nangnile nin ompui chak sik, nangni ning nin monom pha rikip a nin sen thei e. Takkha kei chu nangni le pha rikip a ombung nomin.
14.8: Khawanu ning ator seng kha atho e; Sarek rim kahoi kuchunga akanot hi kikinphum ning sik makma anakanot ijei.
14.9: Tunchu, akidik tak a kini rilpe hi-e simleichung pumpui chongkahoi kinrilna munna, khawanu ning aleitho ngaikha ama mindonna le kinroi a akinril sik e je.>> Judas ning Jesu pesuoksik awanom (Mat 26:14-16; Lk 22:3-6)
14.10: Khan thiemroi somle inni ngai karra Judas Iscariot antipa khaning Jesu pesuok nasik thiempu kolok ngai deng alei se je.
14.11: Anmani ning achong kha anjet pha anlei rokpui, sumsan pesik a kintepna annei je. Khawa jarra Judas khaning Jesu kha anmanideng pesuok thei nasik lampui alei-entok je. Jesu ning athiemroi ngai rakan reikahoi bu abakpui (Mat 26:17-25; Lk 22:7-14,21-23; Jn 13:21-30)
14.12: Chol phillei Waipol reihoi nikho amasatak ning, Rakan reikahoi bak nasik keelmong ngai that ning nikho khan, Jesu thiemroi ngaining anleirakal, <<Rakan rei bakbung nasik nangni jarra khon mo kinbol sik a nomonom?>>
14.13: Khan Jesu ning ankarra miring inni aleitirra hi-ang aleiminjet: <<Nangni khopui a son seru, khanna tuibel kodom mi inkhat ninkin tongpui sik. Ama kunuk kha jui ru
14.14: Ama lutna inn, kupupa deng khan tiru: <Oja ning ka thiemroi ngai le kei Rakan reikahoi kinbak nasik inn kha khon mi?>
14.15: Khawa pha amaning inn chungden kolok tak, aminleng sa inkhat ani min musik, khanna khan ang rikip eini sik a ninmintuk sik e.>>
14.16: Khawa munkha athiemroi ngai anlei mathaanli, khopui teng anlei se jei, khanna Jesu ning aminjet ang kopo-a angrikip anwamu je; khana Rakan reikahoi bakbung nasik a anmintuk je.
14.17: Kholei ahong tung pha, Jesu ning thiemroi somle inni ngai le an hong jei.
14.18: Anmani ning dokhang chunga anbak lai, Jesu ning aleiti, <<Akidik tak a kini rilpe e ninkarra kei le kinbakbung inkhat ning kei anape suok sik.>>
14.19: Athiemroi ngai ning anmulung aleidong a, inkhat soli inkhat ning, <<Kei nini tina chu imak nu, a-e mi?>> antia amadeng anleirakal.
14.20: Jesu ning aleimasang, <<Nangni somle inni karra inkhat, Kei le waipol kheeng sunga kinthun bungpa hi e.
14.21: Chong kinthenga aleikinje ang a, Miring Sapa kha athi nger sik e; takkha miring sapa akapesuok sik mipa kha angtuk mo amachal kase-e! Ama sik a alei kinte mak ning atha det sik e!>> Puma janbu bakminchunna (Mat 26:26-30; Lk 22:14-20; 1 Cor 11:23-25)
14.22: Anmani ning anbak lai, Jesu ning Waipol her kha alei a Pathien nina le minpakna anei a, aher akhoi a, khan a thiemroi ngai deng aleipe, <<Kinlei ru, hiwahi kataksa e,>> aleiti.
14.23: Khan amaning hai kha alei a, Pathien minpakna anei a anmanideng aleipe; khana richu ankholo a anlei in.
14.24: Jesu ning aleiti, <<Hiwa hi mi katamtak sik a akolong, Pathien le kinnomna jetnasik kithisen kha e.
14.25: Akidik tak kiniril pe e, Pathien Rengram ma theiburju ther kha ki-in mak karseng hiwa theiburju hi inno ning jei.>>
14.26: Khan anmani ning laa ansak a, Olive chingtang teng anleise jei. Jesu ning Peter akinlep sik arildik (Mat 26:31-35; Lk 22:31-34; Jn 13:36-38)
14.27: Jesu ning anmanideng aleiti, <<Nangni ninkholo a nintaan sik khanna kei nana mathaan sik je, ajarchu chong kintheng ning ati, <Pathien ning keelmong kakhal pa kha athat sik, khan keelmong ngaikha ankin chek chai sik jei.>
14.28: Tak kei hi akiringa kathei nok li, Galilee a ninma a kalei se sik.>>
14.29: Peter ning aleimasang, <<Alak ngai sengning analei mathaan inum keining chu nada phit noning!>>
14.30: Jesu ning Peter deng aleiti, <<Keining nangdeng akidik tak kiniril pe e, atun jan tak hin arkhong ning woini akinram mak lai woithum rak kei hi jetmang niti sik.>>
14.31: Peter ning rasa kanger det-a aleimasang, <<Nang le nithi bung sik achang inum, kha-ang chu tiphit noning!>> Khana thiemroi ankholo-a kha-anga anlei ti rip. Jesu ning Gethsemane a Pathien nina aleinei (Mat 26:36-46; Lk 22:39-46)
14.32: Anmani ning Gethsemane anti munkhan anhong je, khan Jesu ning thiemroi ngai deng aleiti, <<Pathien nina kanei lai hiwa hin kin-ong ru.>>
14.33: Amaning Peter, James le John aleiroi. Khana kinrimna le mulung pongna achunga ahong tung je,
14.34: khana amaning anmanideng aleiti, <<Kumulung hi adong hei-a thina sik kutung a ije. Hinnahin om inlang kinrinchak ru.>>
14.35: Alek akalak det ase a, leithoi a akinbok-a, a ithei sik inchu khawa mulung pongna kha ama chunga asuok mak nasik a aleini.
14.36: Amaning aleini, <<Apa, Kapa! Nang sik-a angrikip a-ithei rip. Hiwa mulung pongna hai hi kei ria nakhek pe ro. Khanum kei lungdo ilei a, nang nulungdo e rase.>>
14.37: Khan ama ahong kirra thiemroi inthum ngai anleijal kha aleimu. Amaning Peter deng aleiti, <<Simon, nang najal mi je? Pung khatbei sik num akaher a om torlei mo ni-e?>>
14.38: Khan amaning anmanideng aleiti, <<Kinrinchak ru, mathemna ninta makna sik Pathien nina neiru. Ratha ningchu amonom, tak taksa chu adol.>>
14.39: Ama awasenok li Pathien nina, anga-ngai a aleineinok.
14.40: Khan athiemroi ngaideng ahong kirnok a anleijal kha aleimunok; anmit lei malong tormuk. Khana anmani ning anmanideng angmo arilsik leijet mak.
14.41: Woithum changna ahong kirnok a, amaning anmanideng aleiti, <<Nangni atun kutung ninlajal a pong ninla minchum mi? Ahun je! Apha kha ahong je! Enru, Miring Sapa kha setna kanei ngai kutchunga akinpe je.
14.42: Thei ru, eini se rang ri. Enru, anakape suok sikpa kha hin-na a-om je!>> Jesu ansur (Mat 26:47-56; Lk 22:47-53; Jn 18:3-12)
14.43: Jesu ning kha-ang chong arillai, thiemroi somle-inni ngai karra Judas kha ahongtung je. Ama le kinroi-a mipui ngai, Dan Oja ngai, upa ngai chemjamle luchei anchoi a thiempu kolok ngaining anhong tir je.
14.44: Akape suokpa khaning mipui ngai kha anjet nasik inkit inkhat aleipe: <<Keining komojop sikpa kha ninmanom pa kha e. Sur ru khan khal inlang keiso ru.>>
14.45: Judas ahei tunglimli, Jesu deng ase-a, <<Oja!>> atia awamojop.
14.46: Khan anmani ning Jesu kha ansurra khan ankhit tit je.
14.47: Tak amadonna akingir mi inkhat ning achemjam aheikalek a, Thiempu chungnung asokpa kuor atuk chet pe je.
14.48: Khan Jesu ning anmanideng aleiti, <<Muruk malet kusur sik anga chemjam le luchei kinroi-a kei kusur sik ninhong mi?
14.49: Aniso nangni le ni-ombunga Bek-inna kiniminchu jet, kei nalei sur muk chu. Tak Chongkintheng khachu pui alatung nger sik e.>>
14.50: Khan thiemroi rikip ngaining anmathaanli antan del je.
14.51: Pon kinnem bei kisil rother inkhat ning Jesu nuk aleijui. Anmani ning amakha sur sik a anleitho,
14.52: tak aponsil kha aleida li aroksai-a aleitaan. Jesu upa rup ngai maikunga anleiroi (Mat 26:57-68; Lk 22:54,55,63-71; Jn 18:13,14,19-24)
14.53: Khan anmani ning Jesu kha Thiempu Chungnung inna anroi je; khana khan thiempu kolok ngai seng le upa ngai khan Dan oja ngai le anlei kintup.
14.54: Peter ning alek kin-karra ahei jui, Thiempu Chungnung tollai sung a aheilut. Khanna khan raalmi ngaile anlei kin onga mei anlei otbung.
14.55: Thiempu kolok ngai le ankintup upa ngai seng ning Jesu that theina sik ajar anlei entok, tak inkhat te num leimumuk.
14.56: Jesu thothelna wartheng sakhi katamtak anril, tak ansakhi pe ngaikha ite leikin angmak.
14.57: Khan mi alek anhei ngir a Jesu thothelna hiwa wartheng sakhi hi anlei pe:
14.58: <<Keinining ama atikha kinjet, <Miring ning ansak hiwa bek-inn hi keining kithet sik, khan ni thum so-a miring ning ansak mak inkhat keining kasak sik.> >>
14.59: Kha achang inum anmani ngai sakhi pe kha leikin angmuk.
14.60: Thiempu Chungnung khaning anmani rikip maikunga angir a Jesu deng chong aleirakal, <<Anmani ning nang chunga thothelna anril hi masang lei sik mo ni-e?>>
14.61: Takkha Jesu ning a-omchena chong inkhat lei rilmak. Ret Thiempu chungnung ning Jesu deng arakal nok, <<Nang hi ralwan katha Pathien Sapa Messiah kha mo ni-e?>>
14.62: Jesu ning aleimasang, <<Kei ki-e, khana Miring Sapa kha akarat tak changteng akin-onga khana marwan sumphai le kinroi-a ahong chum kha ninkholo a ninmu rip sik e.>>
14.63: Thiempu chungnung khaning apon akeitherra aleiti, <<Eini ning sakhi alop rangai mak je!
14.64: Pathien arildek hi nangni ning ninjet je. Angmo ninmindon e?>> Ankholo ning amanom muk jei: anminthel a khan amakha nithat sik e anti.
14.65: Alek ning Jesu kha anleimichil thon anleiphut, khan anmani ning amakha amit ankhitpe a anleisuk. <<Najetmi atuning mo anasuk e!>> anmani ning anleiti. Khan raalmi ngaining anleiroi a amakha anleikaben. Peter ning Jesu jetmong ati (Mat 26:69-75; Lk 22:56-62; Jn 18:15-18,25-27)
14.66: Peter kha tollai a aleiom lai, Thiempu chungnung sok numeisa karra inkhat akolla aheiwa.
14.67: Soknu khaning Peter mei a-ot kha amu-a, alei en nganga aleiti, <<Nang num, Nazareth Jesu le ninlei kin roi.>>
14.68: Takkha Peter ning alei kinthing phirra aleimasang, <<Angkhami nangning niti kei jetmang,>> khan amaning inkhar tolteng aleise. Khawa laitak khan arkhong kha ahong kinram je.
14.69: Soknu khaning ama amu nok-a amodon na akingir ngaideng khan arilnok, <<Hiwa mipa hi anmani karra inkhat e!>> ati.
14.70: Takkha Peter akinthing phir nok je. Tomlak soa akolla akingir ngai ning Peter deng anleiti, <<Soilei-a nang anmani karra inkhat ni-e, ajarchu nang Galilee ria ni-e.>>
14.71: Khan Peter ning aleiti, <<Kei akidik kiril e, kikin hakser hi-e! Akidik kiril mak inchu Pathien ning nakarak rase! Keining ninril mipa hi jetmang!>>
14.72: Khawa laitak khan arkhong ning woini changna ahong kin ram je, khawa pha Peter deng Jesu ning aleiti, <<Arkhong woini ahong kinram mak lai nangning kei woithum rak jetmang niti sik.>> aleiti kha amindon jei. Khanna ama amulung kintok tak a aleichap.

15.1: Jingteng ma a thiempu kolok ngaining upa ngai, Dan Oja ngai, khan upa rupngai ankholo a kinrangtak a ankintup a khan chong anleimintuk. Anmani ning Jesu kha thirrui a ankhit a anleiroi, khan Pilate kutchunga anleipe.
15.2: Pilate ning chong aleirakal, <<Nang Jehudi ngai Reng mo ni-e?>> Jesu ning aleimasang, <<Nangning niti kha e je.>>
15.3: Thiempu kolok ngaining Jesu kha akikhella anleirilset,
15.4: khawa jarra Pilate ning Jesu deng aleirakal nok, <<Nang namasanglei sik mo ni-e? Rangairo anmani rikip ning nuchunga anirilset hi!>>
15.5: Jesu ning chongbai khat num leimasang nokmak, khawa jarra Pilate ning aleingak. Jesu thatnasik chongtan (Mat 27:15-26; Lk 23:13-25; Jn 18:39--19:16)
15.6: Rakan Reikahoi anthoracham ansurra anda ngai karra mipui anmanomna miring inkhat kha Pilate ning aleimoso pe chak.
15.7: Khawa lai khan Barabbas anti raalruk ngaile mikathat miring inkhat mikhumna a anlei om.
15.8: Mipui ngai kha anhong kintup a aleitho ang a athonoknasik Pilate deng anhongti,
15.9: Pilate ning anmanideng aleirakal, <<Jehudi ngai Rengpa kha kunumoso pe sik nin monom mi?>>
15.10: Thiempu kolok ngaining Jesu chunga thangse annei jarra akut chunga anhei pesuok e ti kha Pilate ning aleijet.
15.11: Takkha thiempu kolok ngaining mipui ngai kha anleimathok a, Barabbas pot kha moso nasik a anlei minti.
15.12: Pilate ning mipui deng aleirilnok, <<khachu nangni ning Jehudi ngai Reng tia ninkoi padeng kei angmo ninimintho nom?>>
15.13: Anmani ning anhei ong malet a, <<Cross a makhai ro!>> anti.
15.14: Takkha Pilate ning aleirakal, <<Angsik jarra, amaning ang thothel namo anei e?>> Anmani ning akikhella an-onga anleiti, <<Cross a makhai ro!>>
15.15: Pilate ning mipui mulungkha aleimintai nom jarra Barabbas kha anmani sik a aleimoso pe jei. Khan Jesu kha anrachak a cross a makhai sik a aleipe jei. Raalmi ngaining Jesu anmunuiso (Mat 27:27-31; Jn 19:2,3)
15.16: Raalmi ngaining Jesu kha Ramkoron pa inn tollai sunga ankei minlut a khan raalmi rikip anlei kinkoichun.
15.17: Anmani ning pon sendup akinchuol kha Jesu anleiminsil, liling ria anbol lukhu, kha alu chunga anleiminkhu.
15.18: Khan anmani ngaining <<Jehudi Rengpa niringsei sot rase!>> tia chibei anleitho.
15.19: Anmani ngaining Jesu lukha luchei ning anleirachak, anleimichilthon, khan ankemorkhup anthep a ankinkun a anleikumuk.
15.20: Anmani ning anmunuipui soli, pon sendup akinchuol kha anlik pe a, khan ama pon kha anminsil malet je. Khan cross a makhai thatsik a ankei so je. Jesu cross a anmakhai (Mat 27:32-44; Lk 23:26-43; Jn 19:17-27)
15.21: Lampui-a anmani ning mi inkhat ariming Simon anti aram ria khopui a akahong anlei kintonga, khan raalmi ngaining amakha namrop a Jesu cross kha anlei mindom. Simon kha Cyrene mi e khana Alexander le Rufus ngai pa e.
15.22: Anmani ning Jesu kha Golgotha, hiwa tina chu <<Lusai mun>> antina khan anroi je.
15.23: Khana khan theiburju le lei anminchun kha myrrh anti kha min innasik anleitho, tak Jesu khawa kha lei in mak.
15.24: Khan Jesu kha cross a anmakhai a ama ponder kha anmani ning anleikinsem, atu ningmo pon kinlek kha anpha sik tia machal anlei-en.
15.25: Cross a anmakhai kha jingteng pung ko a-e.
15.26: Ama cross chung a engset chonga hi-anghin anleitar: <<JEHUDI NGAI RENGPA.>>
15.27: Ama le kinroi-a muruk inni, inkhat achangteng, inkhat awoiteng cross a anmakhai del.
15.29: Mi akase akahong ngaining anlu ankalek a chong ero a Jesu deng anleiril: <<O-a! Bek-inn nithet li nithum sunga kasak sik niti khale!
15.30: Atun cross chung ria hong chum inlang, nibinga kinhuk rang ro!>>
15.31: Khawa angkhan thiempu kolok ngai le Dan oja ngai ning Jesu anmunui so-a, inkhat le inkhat ankinbek a, <<Amaning milak chu ahuk a, abinga chu kinhuk tor mak!
15.32: Messiah Israel ngai Rengpa, cross chung ria atun hongchum ro, khan nahongchum kha kinmuli keini ning nataksen kinte!>> Khan cross a ama le anmakhai bung inni ngai khaning num ama anlei ril set. Jesu thina (Mat 27:45-56; Lk 23:44-49; Jn 19:28-30)
15.33: Sunchimma ram pumpui akijing ning aleimukhu, khawakha pung inthum kutung kha-angkhan aleiti je.
15.34: Pung inthum a Jesu rasa kinlaktak a-onga, <<Eloi, Eloi, lema sabachthani?>> ati, hiwa tina chu, <<Ka Pathien, ka Pathien angsikmo kei nana dadoi e?>>
15.35: Khana akaom mi alek ngaining anjet a anti, <<Rangai ru, amaning Elijah akoi hi!>>
15.36: Ankarra mi inkhat ataanna ponlom kha theiburju kuthur kha amiche-a luchei inkhat mor a akithil a, khana ria Jesu ner katung amajop nasik apeli aleiti, <<Ngaakdiri! Elijah ahonga ama cross ria akadom mata sik mi, enri!>>
15.37: Khana rasa kinringa a-onga Jesu kha athi jei.
15.38: Bek-inna andong pon kha achung ria athoi kutung aher inni a akin ther je.
15.39: Khawa mun a cross mudon akingir raalmi lamkakei inkhat ning Jesu thidan kha aleimu. Amaning aleiti, <<Akidiktak a hiwa mipa hi Pathien Sapa e!>>
15.40: Akalakdet ria alei ka-en numei alek anlei om. Ankarra khan Mary Magdalene, anaipa James le Joseph annu Mary, khana Salome ngai an e.
15.41: Anmani ning Jesu kha Galilee a aomlai anleijui khan anleisen. Khawa munna khan Jerusalem a ama le anhei kinroi numei katamtak num anlei om. Jesu thaanna anre (Mat 27:57-61; Lk 23:50-56; Jn 19:38-42)
15.42: -43 Arimathea a Joseph ahong tung kha kholei teng a-e je. Amakha Pathien Rengram ahongtung sik alei kangaak, kaja ka-om upa rup karra inkhat e. Khawa kini kha kinrinni e (ti chu, Jehudi ngai Serni kini makma) khana Joseph ning kin-ngam tak a Pilate maikunga awase-a amadeng Jesu kulong kha aleini.
15.44: Pilate ning Jesu athi jei ti aleijet phakhan aleingak. Raalmi lamkakeipa kha akoi-a Jesu thina asot mije tia alei rakal.
15.45: Raalmi lamkakeipa chong ajet so-a, Pilate ning Joseph deng Jesu kulong kha naleithei sik aleitipe.
15.46: Joseph ning ruipon kinnem neng arocho-a, akulong kha akadamthak a pon khaning akusun a lunga ankiwit thaan sunga aware jei. Khana lung kolok inkhat aminlet a thaan inkhar suokna kha aleikhar.
15.47: Mary Magdalene le Joseph nu Mary ning Jesu kulong anrena kha anleimu je.

16.1: Jehudi Serni kini ator so-a, Mary Magdalene le James nu Mary khan Salome ngai Jesu kulong kunot nasik arim kahoi anlei rocho.
16.2: Maapning jingteng matak a, kini ahong suokpha anmani thaan teng anlei se.

16.5: Khan anmani ning thaan sunga alut a, pon kinchoul kabang kachek kinsil khangdong inkhat changteng panga akin-ong anleimu, khan anmani ning anlei kinlai.
16.6: <<Kinlai muru,>> amaning aleiti. <<Nangni ning Nazareth Jesu cross a anmakhai kha nin entok keining kajet. Ama athei a, hin om-mak je! Enru, amaning ajalna kha hi e.
16.7: Atuntak se inlang hiwa chongkahoi hi ama thiemroi ngai le Peter deng warilru: <Ama Galilee teng ninma a aleise je; nang nideng aleiril anga khawa mun a ninwamu sik.> >>
16.8: Anmani ansuok a thaan ria aheitaan je, anchi le anratha kinnok ning asip je. Anmani anchi hei-a atukhat deng inkhatte ril muk je. Jesu Mary Magdalene deng akinlar (Mat 28:1-8; Lk 24:1-12; Jn 20:1-10) [
16.9: Jesu thina ria atheinok nuktenga, maapning kini matak a Mary Magdalene, asung ria khori sari aholsuok penu deng masatak akinlar.
16.10: Khawanu ning ase-a alei kinroipui asap ngaideng aleiril. Anmani anmulung leihoimak a anlei chap;
16.11: khana numeinu khaning Jesu aring amu-a arilpe ngaikha anjet inum anmani ning leitaksen muk. Jesu ning anuk kujui inni deng akinlar (Lk 24:13-35)
16.12: Khan, Jesu ning ankarra miring inni deng ankho sena lampui a anselai alop det a alei kinlar.
16.13: Anmani ning anhei kirra mi alak deng anwaril pe, takkha anmani ning lei taksen muk. Jesu somle inkhat ngai deng akinlar (Mat 28:16-20; Lk 24:36-49; Jn 20:19-23; Sin 1:6-8)
16.14: Nuktenga, Jesu thiemroi somle inkhat ngai bu anbak lai alei kinlar. Anmanideng aleiren, ajarchu anmani taksenna neimuk khan anmulung anger rangra, ama aring jei tia akumu ngai chong kha taksen tor muk.
16.15: Jesu ning anmanideng aleiti, <<Simleichung pumpui a se inlang khan chongkahoi hi miring rikip deng warilru.
16.16: Tu achang inum ataksen a baptized akatho mi kha hukminring achen sik; tu achang inum akataksen mak mi kha misetna achen sik.
16.17: Akataksen ngai kha hiwa sin kinlak thotor na ranak akinpe sik; anmani ning kei riming a khori ngai holsuok torna annei sik; anmani ning anjetngaimak chonglop anchong sik;
16.18: murul ngai ansura a-imakli tur an-in inum ite tinonung; mi akana ngai chunga ankut anda sik khana akana ngai kha andam sik.>> Jesu marwan akal (Lk 24:50-53; Sin 1:9-11)
16.19: Puma Jesu ning anmanideng chong aril so pha, amakha marwan chungteng anroi a khan Pathien akut changteng akin-ong je.
16.20: Thiemroi ngai ning anse a amun rikip a chongkahoi anwaril, khan Puma ning anmani ngai kha akinroipui chak, khan antho sin kinlak ngai khaning anmani chongril kha adik tia amalar pe jei.] Alop amuro atorna (16:9-10)
16.21: [Numeinu kha Peter le asap ngaideng ase a anmanideng aleikinti seng kha akabei a awamin jet.
16.22: Khan, kumleiko hukminringna akintheng le akiring chak chongpui kha Jesu khet ning ama thiemroi ngaikha, niso teng ria taitak teng kutung aleimoso jei.]
